mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls signals rising aggregate labor income and consumer spending capacity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through higher expected corporate revenues.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns follow months of positive PAYEMS momentum in less than 55% of instances over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid 0.4 percentage point increase in the unemployment rate over three months signals labor market deterioration that precedes downward earnings revisions, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises more than 0.4pp over 3 months
failure_condition: Triggered episodes fail to produce negative 20-day returns in at least 60% of cases over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the Federal Reserve raises the federal funds rate while industrial production is simultaneously expanding, the resulting financial tightening into a strong real economy leads to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as future discount rates dominate cash flow growth.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change positive and INDPRO 3-month change positive
evidence_refs: fact:Fed funds at 0.08% and INDPRO at 101.6 in late 2021
failure_condition: The interaction term between FEDFUNDS changes and INDPRO changes does not significantly predict negative 60-day returns with a t-statistic exceeding 2.0 over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During an active monetary tightening cycle, a higher federal funds rate level transmits into negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days because each basis point of policy tightening immediately lifts short-term discount rates and compresses equity valuations.
evidence_refs: fact:Market priced liftoff beginning in 2022 as of Dec 2021
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 50% of months during tightening cycles, or Rank IC is not significantly negative with p-value below 0.05 over a 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in the industrial production index signals strengthening manufacturing momentum and higher capacity utilization, which drives positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days via earnings surprise anticipation.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns follow INDPRO acceleration in fewer than 55% of months over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real GDP signals broad-based aggregate demand expansion that lifts corporate profit expectations across sectors, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings forecasts are revised upward.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value at 19469.4 for Q2 2021
failure_condition: Quarterly GDPC1 growth does not produce positive 60-day returns in at least 60% of subsequent quarters over a 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising consumer prices and falling retail sales creates a stagflationary squeeze on real household purchasing power, driving negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days as margin and volume expectations deteriorate simultaneously.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL rising and RSAFS falling over a 3-month window
evidence_refs: fact:CPI at 278.88 and retail sales at 639829 in Nov 2021
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising CPIAUCSL and falling RSAFS fails to produce negative 20-day returns in more than 55% of triggered episodes over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained housing starts above 1.5 million units signal durable construction activity and household formation strength that propagates through credit-sensitive sectors, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST 3-month moving average exceeds 1500 thousand units
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST at 1520 thousand units in Oct 2021
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of months when housing starts are above threshold over any 3-year rolling window.
